title: Mossel Bay fraud case postponed again
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The case against Robert...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The case against Robert Pace, the Mossel Bay man facing charges of fraud amounting to millions of rands, was postponed again for legal aid.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The case against Robert Pace, the Mossel Bay man facing charges of fraud amounting to millions of rands, was postponed again for legal aid."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Pace allegedly posed as a developer, telling people he had earmarked a piece of land for a housing development. Between 2018 and 2024, he allegedly received thousands of rands from several victims who had wanted to buy a plot of land on the development site."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Advertiser previously reported that 19 cases had been reported to the police, the total amounting to almost R3m.","html":"Mossel Bay Advertiser previously reported that 19 cases had been reported to the police, the total amounting to almost R3m."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pace made his first appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on 30 July 2024, and on 6 August that year, he was granted bail of R10 000.","html":"Pace made his first appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on 30 July 2024, and on 6 August that year, he was granted bail of R10 000."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His bail conditions include that he is not allowed to contact any of the alleged victims, and that he surrenders his passport.","html":"His bail conditions include that he is not allowed to contact any of the alleged victims, and that he surrenders his passport."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He appeared on 14 January. He is due to appear again on 25 February.","html":"He appeared on 14 January. He is due to appear again on 25 February."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["'Bouer' op bedrogklagte bly in aanhouding","Borgtog van R10 000 aan Pace toegestaan","Ontwikkelaar vandag in hof vir bedrog"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Mossel Bay fraud case postponed again
